title: ApplicabilityTest (L3, first-class)
description: A first-class, machine-evaluable Applicability Test object. Given a facet context, an Applicability Test decides whether a specific authority clause applies to a given org / product / activity, and emits an obligation set (and optional risk class). This is the canonical contract for the AST runtime engine at packages/engines/src/applicability-ast.ts.

authority_id.description: Versioned authority reference, e.g. eu-ai-act@2024-1689, gdpr@679-2016, dora@2554-2022.

applies_when.description: Conjunction of facet predicates. All predicates MUST evaluate true for the test to fire.

facet.description: Facet name from the ReguNav facet taxonomy (e.g. 'jurisdiction', 'aiUseCase', 'entityKind').

value.description: Operand. Scalar for eq/neq/gte/lte/matches, array for in/not-in, omitted-but-still-present for exists/not-exists.

role_sensitive.description: True if the test's outcome depends on which ReguNav actor role evaluates it.

roles.description: Roles for which this test is authoritative.

output.description: What firing this test emits into the obligation graph.

obligation_set_id.description: Reference to a canonical obligation set (e.g. OBLSET-EUAI-HIGHRISK-CORE).

risk_class.description: Optional risk classification emitted alongside the obligation set.

version.description: Semantic version of this test definition.

source_provenance.description: Chain of authoritative sources this test derives from. At least one required.

effective_from.description: ISO 8601 date when this test becomes effective.

effective_until.description: ISO 8601 date when this test is retired.

supersedes.description: List of applicability_test_id values that this test replaces.
